also, you're not using brown wheels

then just have vulnerable cleanse on your team, leigh is really good bc she heals based on max hp
and u can easily tank the boss
i dont care what wheels u have, they are irrelevant bc you should be running all r wheels except for your carry

Team for GHelot? Kath, tinct, karen and arachne are already occupied in one team.
ghelot/aigis/thais + 4th. 4th slot can be horla, helot (strike support with exalt), or clem. You can also try running jenkins in the 4th slot as a crit damage support with exalt.

Looks fine for early game, just have fun and experiment with different realms/characters. For new players, wouldn't really recommend any of the current limited banners other than arachne. So save for half anni banners which will be sometime "soon".

<@485329396736065549> Since you are arc 1, you might want to consider swapping out some of your current wheels for the rare/brown wheels. Gluttony in particular is very strong. You can check out Cheri's guide, it should have a rundown on them.
